case_title: LOUIS E. THELEMAQUE VS. UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THELEMAQUE, LOUIS E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THELEMAQUE, LOUIS E. AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY THOMAS NICHOLS--SECURITY INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,040.00 FILED BY THELEMAQUE, LOUIS E. AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
